mapper.select:
SELECT p.seq, p.member_name AS memberName, p.phone_number AS phoneNumber, p.time_slot AS timeSlot, p.current_class AS currentClass, p.start_date AS startDate, p.end_date AS endDate, p.reason, p.status, p.reject_reason AS rejectReason, p.created_date AS createdDate FROM complex_postponement_requests p
ORDER BY p.created_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.seq, p.member_name AS memberName, p.phone_number AS phoneNumber, p.time_slot AS timeSlot, p.current_class AS currentClass, p.start_date AS startDate, p.end_date AS endDate, p.reason, p.status, p.reject_reason AS rejectReason, p.created_date AS createdDate FROM complex_postponement_requests p WHERE p.member_seq = #{memberSeq} ORDER BY p.created_date DESC
